description_long: This is a single-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a simple, modern design. The front facade features a prominent entry door, slightly ajar, flanked by two rectangular windows. The side and rear elevations have minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy and a utilitarian aesthetic. A raised rectangular structure, likely a chimney or utility shaft, is attached to one side of the roof. The exterior walls are finished in a muted beige or light tan color, while the roof and trim are rendered in shades of gray. The overall appearance is functional and understated, suitable for urban or suburban environments.
description: A single-story, flat-roofed modern house with a beige exterior, minimal windows, and a simple entry door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door and two windows, with the chimney structure visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with two small windows and the chimney structure extending from the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible windows or doors, highlighting the flat roof and chimney.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal detailing and no visible windows or doors.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with no porch or overhang, flanked by two rectangular windows.
